title: Capability
description: A Capability is a Noun:Verb pair — the atomic unit of business activity. It represents a complete statement of what can happen in the domain: Loan.Approve, Order.Ship, Employee.Terminate.

noun.description: The Noun this capability belongs to.

verb.description: The Verb to be performed on the Noun.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this capability represents.

examples.name: Order.Ship
examples.description: Ships a fulfilled order to the customer.
